narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 2-C (precinct in Medina County) has 890 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
